news.t: DOLLARAMA REPORTS FISCAL 2027 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS

holdings.infoBox: DOL is an equity ETF with a total of 299 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.83%, Samsung Electronics at 3.68%, HSBC Holdings at 1.99%, Novartis AG at 1.45%, and Intesa Sanpaolo at 1.44%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree True Developed International Fund (DOL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a modified market cap-weighted index that measures the performance of dividend-paying large-cap companies outside Canada and the US. DOL was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
